plugins.name: Top.gg Voter Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-reward Top.gg voters with Discord roles that expire on a configurable timer (1 hour to 7 days).
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns a Discord role to users who upvote your bot on Top.gg. Roles are granted within seconds via signed Top.gg webhook events (HMAC-SHA256) and automatically removed when the configurable TTL expires — anywhere from 1 hour to 168 hours. Multi-server distribution, no manual cleanup, no scheduled jobs. Integrates with RoleLogic's role link system to reward and recognize community members who support your Discord bot on Top.gg.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: How to Reward Top.gg Voters With Discord Roles Automatically
seo.seoDescription: Auto-grant Discord roles to your Top.gg voters via webhook—no manual cleanup. Configurable expiry from 1 hour to 7 days. Free and no coding required.
seo.h1: Reward Top.gg Voters With Discord Roles — Automatically
seo.subhead: Members upvote your bot on Top.gg, RoleLogic gives them a Discord role, and the role expires on your schedule (1 hour to 7 days). No webhook babysitting, no scheduled jobs, no manual cleanup.

useCases.title: Voter perks that auto-expire
useCases.body: Hand voters access to a bonus channel, custom command, or giveaway entry — automatically revoked when the role TTL you set runs out (anywhere from 1 hour to 168 hours).

useCases.title: Climb the Top.gg rankings
useCases.body: Discord roles are visible incentives. Voters see the role land in their member list, remember to vote again on the next cycle, and your bot moves up the Top.gg leaderboard for free.

useCases.title: Tiered loyalty roles
useCases.body: Stack the auto-expiring voter role with permanent loyalty roles ('Top Supporter' for 50+ votes) using the Referral Code plugin or any other RoleLogic condition.

useCases.title: Multi-server voting in one webhook
useCases.body: Top.gg fires one webhook per vote; RoleLogic distributes the role to every Discord server you've registered the plugin in. One vote, roles in every linked server.

howItWorks.title: Connect your Top.gg bot to RoleLogic
howItWorks.body: Paste the webhook URL and signing secret from your Top.gg bot dashboard into the plugin config. One-time setup, takes a couple of minutes.

howItWorks.title: Pick your role and expiry window
howItWorks.body: Choose the Discord role to assign and the TTL — anything from 1 hour to 168 hours (7 days). The role is removed automatically when the timer runs out.

howItWorks.title: Members vote, roles flow in
howItWorks.body: Top.gg signs and sends each vote event. RoleLogic verifies the HMAC-SHA256 signature and assigns the role within seconds, then revokes it when the TTL expires.

faqs.q: Do I need a Top.gg API key or webhook secret?
faqs.a: A webhook URL and signing secret — both generated from your Top.gg bot dashboard. RoleLogic verifies every event with HMAC-SHA256 so a malicious caller can't spoof votes.

faqs.q: How long does the voter role last?
faqs.a: You choose — 1 hour to 168 hours (7 days). Top.gg's standard 12-hour vote cooldown is the most common setting, but you can match the timer to your event, season, or perk window.

faqs.q: How fast are roles assigned after a vote?
faqs.a: Within seconds. Top.gg pushes a webhook the moment the vote is recorded; RoleLogic queues the role assignment and the bot grants it on the next sync tick.

faqs.q: What happens when the role expires?
faqs.a: RoleLogic removes it automatically. The expiry worker runs every 60 seconds and revokes any role past its TTL — no manual cleanup, no cron jobs to run.

faqs.q: Can I run this across multiple Discord servers?
faqs.a: Yes. Top.gg fires one webhook per vote and RoleLogic distributes the role to every guild where the plugin is configured, so a single vote can land roles everywhere at once.

plugins.name: Genshin Player Role
plugins.short_description: Verify Genshin Impact players by UID and assign Discord roles based on AR, World Level, Spiral Abyss, achievements, characters, and server region.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Genshin Impact player stats. Players verify by UID with a one-time profile-signature handshake; data is pulled from Enka.Network's public API (no HoYoLAB login required). Configure conditions using Adventure Rank (1–60), World Level (0–8), achievements, Spiral Abyss floor + chamber clears or total stars (0–36), server region (NA / EU / Asia / TW-HK-MO / CN), showcased character with optional level and constellation filters, or showcased namecard. Roles stay synced as players progress. View a list of verified Genshin Impact players in your Discord server to track linked accounts and their stats.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: Discord Bot for Genshin Impact — Verify Players and Sync Stats
seo.seoDescription: Verify Genshin Impact players via UID and assign Discord roles by Adventure Rank, World Level, Spiral Abyss, achievements, region, and showcased characters.
seo.h1: Verify Genshin Impact Players & Sync Stats to Discord Roles
seo.subhead: Members link their Genshin UID with a one-time profile signature handshake. RoleLogic pulls live stats from Enka.Network — AR, World Level, Spiral Abyss, achievements, characters, namecards — and syncs Discord roles as players progress.

useCases.title: Adventure Rank tier roles
useCases.body: Tiered roles for AR 30+, AR 45+, AR 55+, AR 60. Auto-promoted as players rank up — no more screenshots in #verification, no more manual rank checks.

useCases.title: Spiral Abyss endgame recognition
useCases.body: Gate roles on Spiral Abyss floor + chamber clears or total stars (0–36). Recognize 36-star runners, F12 clears, and other endgame milestones without manual approval.

useCases.title: Server-region channels
useCases.body: Auto-route members into NA / EU / Asia / TW-HK-MO / CN server channels based on their Genshin server region — useful for co-op coordination and timing region-specific events.

useCases.title: Character and namecard collectors
useCases.body: Reward players who showcase a specific 5-star character (with optional minimum constellation or level) or display a rare namecard — perfect for character mains, achievement chasers, and event-themed roles.

useCases.title: Achievement-count tiers
useCases.body: Tiered roles for 300+, 500+, 800+ achievements. Recognize completionists automatically without checking every profile by hand.

howItWorks.title: Member enters their UID and verification code
howItWorks.body: RoleLogic generates a short code; the player adds it to their in-game signature for a moment so the plugin can confirm UID ownership. Once verified, the code can be removed.

howItWorks.title: Plugin pulls stats from Enka.Network
howItWorks.body: Public Genshin profile data — AR, World Level, achievements, Spiral Abyss, region, showcased characters and namecards — is fetched from Enka.Network. No HoYoLAB login or API key required.

howItWorks.title: Roles refresh as players progress
howItWorks.body: RoleLogic re-checks stats periodically and updates Discord roles automatically when members rank up, clear new floors, or unlock new achievements.

faqs.q: Does verification work for all server regions?
faqs.a: Yes — NA (America), EU (Europe), Asia, TW-HK-MO, and CN servers are all supported via Enka.Network's public data.

faqs.q: What stats can I gate roles on?
faqs.a: Adventure Rank (1–60), World Level (0–8), achievements, Spiral Abyss floor + chamber, total stars (0–36), server region, showcased characters (with optional level + constellation filters), and showcased namecards by ID.

faqs.q: Why isn't my constellation showing up?
faqs.a: Constellation visibility requires the player to enable 'Display Constellation Level' inside Genshin Impact's character showcase settings. Without it, Enka.Network can't see C-level and the constellation filter won't match.

faqs.q: How often are stats updated?
faqs.a: Refreshed on a background schedule — typically within minutes to an hour of in-game progress, depending on how active the member is and how recently they verified.

faqs.q: Do I need any HoYoverse API access?
faqs.a: No. The plugin uses Enka.Network, which mirrors public Genshin profile data without needing a HoYoLAB login or API key. No password, no game token.

plugins.name: YouTube Subscriber Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles to verified YouTube subscribers with one-click Google OAuth.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles to members subscribed to a YouTube channel. Members verify through Google OAuth, and the plugin periodically checks subscription status via the YouTube Data API on an adaptive schedule (active members re-checked roughly 6× more often than idle ones). Roles are dynamically assigned to active subscribers and removed when they unsubscribe, keeping your Discord server roles synced with your YouTube audience. Members must keep their subscription list public for the API to verify.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: How to Give Discord Roles to Verified YouTube Subscribers
seo.seoDescription: Auto-assign Discord roles to verified YouTube subscribers with Google OAuth. Re-verifies on a schedule and revokes the role the moment they unsubscribe.
seo.h1: Give Discord Roles to Your YouTube Subscribers — Verified, Automated, Real-Time
seo.subhead: Members link YouTube via Google OAuth, RoleLogic checks if they're subscribed to your channel, and the role is granted. Re-checked on a schedule — the moment they unsubscribe, the role goes too.

useCases.title: Subscriber-only Discord channels
useCases.body: Run a private community gated by a verified subscriber role. No honor system, no manual approval queue — only members who actually subscribed get in.

useCases.title: Member perks that stay honest
useCases.body: Drop giveaways, polls, early-access announcements, and emoji perks behind the Subscriber role. Members who unsubscribe lose access automatically on the next refresh.

useCases.title: Tiered creator rewards
useCases.body: Combine the Subscriber role with other RoleLogic plugins (Twitch follows, server boosts, GitHub contributions) to build layered tiers — 'YouTube + Twitch sub = VIP'.

useCases.title: Audit your real Discord audience
useCases.body: See exactly which Discord members are verified subscribers vs unverified. Useful for measuring how much of your Discord community actually converts to YouTube subs.

howItWorks.title: Add your YouTube channel ID
howItWorks.body: Paste the channel ID you want to verify against. The plugin only checks subscription state for that channel — nothing else, nothing more invasive.

howItWorks.title: Members link via Google OAuth
howItWorks.body: One click. Members hit the verification page, sign in with Google, and the plugin reads their public subscription list to confirm.

howItWorks.title: Roles stay synced automatically
howItWorks.body: RoleLogic re-checks subscriptions on an adaptive schedule — more often when members are active, less often when idle — and adjusts roles when status changes.

faqs.q: Does the member's YouTube subscription have to be public?
faqs.a: Yes. YouTube's Data API only exposes subscription state for members whose subscription list is public. If they've hidden it, verification will fail — they need to disable 'Keep all my subscribed channels private' in YouTube settings.

faqs.q: How often is subscription status re-checked?
faqs.a: Adaptively, based on member activity and your YouTube API quota. Active members are re-checked roughly 6× more often than idle ones — typically every 30 minutes for small servers, scaling to a few hours for very large ones.

faqs.q: What does it cost in YouTube API quota?
faqs.a: RoleLogic batches and caches calls to fit within YouTube's free 10,000-units-per-day quota for most servers. Very large communities can request a higher quota from Google or run their own credentials.

faqs.q: Do I need a Google Cloud project?
faqs.a: Only if you self-host. On hosted RoleLogic the API integration is already wired — you just paste your channel ID and you're done.

faqs.q: What happens when a member unsubscribes?
faqs.a: On the next refresh RoleLogic detects the change and removes the Discord role automatically. No manual revoke, no admin alerts to triage.

plugins.name: GitHub Contributor Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles based on real GitHub contributions — commits, PRs, merged PRs, or issues on any public repo.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on GitHub contribution activity. Configure conditions on commits, pull requests, merged PRs, or issues on any public repository, with operators including =, >, >=, <, <=, and between for range thresholds. Members link Discord and GitHub via OAuth, and the plugin continuously tracks their contributions on the verified email tied to their GitHub account. Perfect for open source community recognition, hackathon and bounty events, issue-reporter rewards, and per-repo gating across multi-project organizations.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: How to Reward GitHub Contributors With Discord Roles
seo.seoDescription: Auto-assign Discord roles by real GitHub contributions—commits, PRs, merged PRs, and issues on any public repo. Range conditions, automatic refresh, no manual badges.
seo.h1: Reward GitHub Contributors With Discord Roles
seo.subhead: Members link Discord and GitHub once. RoleLogic checks contributions to your repo — commits, PRs, merged PRs, issues — and auto-grants Discord roles when they cross the threshold you pick.

useCases.title: Open source contributor recognition
useCases.body: Auto-grant a 'Contributor' role at 1+ merged PR, 'Core Contributor' at 10+, 'Maintainer' at 50+. No manual badge handouts in #verification, no out-of-date contributor lists.

useCases.title: Hackathon and bounty events
useCases.body: Set up contribution rules for a hackathon, bounty push, or sprint. Roles auto-granted as participants hit the count you defined and removed when the event ends if you swap the rule.

useCases.title: Issue triage and reporter rewards
useCases.body: Reward members who file useful bug reports — 'Bug Hunter' at 5+ issues, 'Power Reporter' at 20+. Use a range condition (between 5 and 20) to scope a tier exactly.

useCases.title: Per-repo gating across multiple projects
useCases.body: Run a separate role link per repo so roles map to specific projects — useful for organizations with multiple OSS projects, monorepo subdirectories, or layered Discord communities.

howItWorks.title: Pick a public GitHub repo
howItWorks.body: Enter the owner/repo of the project you want to track. Public repositories only — GitHub's API doesn't expose private contribution data without elevated access.

howItWorks.title: Set the condition
howItWorks.body: Choose the metric (commits, PRs, merged PRs, or issues) and an operator: =, >, >=, <, <=, or 'between' for a range. One condition per role link.

howItWorks.title: Members link GitHub via OAuth
howItWorks.body: Members sign in with GitHub once. RoleLogic matches contributions on the verified email tied to their GitHub account, so commits attributed to that email show up automatically.

faqs.q: Does it work with private repositories?
faqs.a: Public repos only. GitHub's REST API doesn't expose contribution counts on private repos without elevated app permissions, and most communities want a public source of truth anyway.

faqs.q: What contributions count?
faqs.a: Commits, pull requests (all), merged pull requests, and issues. You configure which metric matters and the threshold — including range conditions like 'commits between 5 and 50'.

faqs.q: Why is my contribution count zero even though I committed?
faqs.a: Commit attribution on GitHub depends on the commit email matching a verified email on your GitHub account. If you committed with a different email, GitHub won't credit it to your account and the plugin can't either. Add the commit email to your GitHub profile and re-sync.

faqs.q: How often is contribution data refreshed?
faqs.a: On a background schedule, typically every couple of hours per member. Roles update automatically when new contributions push members across thresholds.

faqs.q: What about GitHub API rate limits?
faqs.a: RoleLogic uses an authenticated GitHub token (5,000 requests/hour) and batches requests under a configurable budget — default 4,500/hour — so quota is never exhausted.

plugins.name: Twitch Follower Role
plugins.short_description: Real-time Discord roles for Twitch followers and Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 subscribers via EventSub.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that assigns Discord roles based on Twitch channel follow and subscription status. Users link Discord and Twitch via OAuth, then roles are automatically assigned based on configurable conditions: require follower status with optional minimum follow days, and/or require subscriber status with optional minimum tier (1 = any, including Twitch Prime; 2 = Tier 2 or higher; 3 = Tier 3 only). Uses Twitch EventSub for near-instant follow, unfollow, sub, and unsub event delivery — no polling, no delay. Keeps Discord roles synced with real Twitch activity in seconds.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: Discord Bot for Twitch Followers and Subscribers — Real-Time Sync
seo.seoDescription: Auto-assign Discord roles for Twitch followers and Tier 1/2/3 subscribers. Powered by EventSub—follow, sub, or unsub and the role updates within seconds.
seo.h1: Give Discord Roles to Your Twitch Followers and Subscribers
seo.subhead: Followers, paid subscribers, Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 — sync them all to Discord roles in real time. Built on Twitch EventSub so the role lands the moment someone follows, subs, or unsubs.

useCases.title: Follower-only Discord channels
useCases.body: Gate a channel behind a Twitch follow. New followers get the role and access in seconds. Unfollows are detected via EventSub and the role is removed automatically.

useCases.title: Tenure-based loyalty roles
useCases.body: Require a minimum follow duration in days — 'Followed 30+ days' for a community-veteran role, '180+ days' for a loyalty tier. RoleLogic computes tenure from the actual follow timestamp.

useCases.title: Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 subscriber roles
useCases.body: Assign different Discord roles for any-tier subs (includes Twitch Prime), Tier 2+ only, or Tier 3 only. Stack with the follower role to recognize both tenure and dollar tier.

useCases.title: Subscriber-only giveaways and emotes
useCases.body: Combine the Subscriber role with RoleLogic conditions to gate giveaways, polls, bonus emotes, and channels for paying subs only.

howItWorks.title: Connect your Twitch channel
howItWorks.body: One-time broadcaster OAuth from your Twitch account so RoleLogic can subscribe to follow and subscription events on your channel via Twitch EventSub.

howItWorks.title: Pick your conditions
howItWorks.body: 'Require follower' (with optional minimum follow days) and/or 'Require subscriber' (with optional minimum tier — 1, 2, or 3). All enabled conditions are AND'd together.

howItWorks.title: Members link Twitch via OAuth
howItWorks.body: Members log in with Twitch on the verification page. From there, EventSub keeps follow and subscription status in sync automatically — no polling, no delay.

faqs.q: How fast are role updates?
faqs.a: Near-instant. Twitch EventSub pushes follow / unfollow / sub / unsub / re-sub events within seconds, and RoleLogic applies them on the next sync tick.

faqs.q: Can I gate roles on follow tenure (e.g. 'followed 30+ days')?
faqs.a: Yes. Set a Min Follow Days threshold and the plugin checks the actual follow timestamp from Twitch. Members under the threshold won't get the role until they cross it — no manual review.

faqs.q: Does Twitch Prime count as a subscriber?
faqs.a: Yes — Twitch Prime is treated as Tier 1 by the Twitch API, so it satisfies an 'any tier' subscriber condition. If you require Tier 2 or higher, Prime won't qualify.

faqs.q: Do I need anything from Twitch?
faqs.a: On hosted RoleLogic, no. The plugin handles the Twitch app, EventSub registration, and OAuth callbacks. You just authorize once as the broadcaster so RoleLogic can listen for events on your channel.

faqs.q: What if a member unfollows or their sub lapses?
faqs.a: Twitch fires the matching EventSub event and RoleLogic removes the role automatically. No grace period unless you configure one via tenure conditions.

plugins.name: Member Origin Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles by country, timezone, UTC offset, language, platform, browser, or device type — with built-in VPN and impossible-travel detection.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that assigns Discord roles based on member origin detected from HTTP headers and browser APIs. Automatically detects country (via Cloudflare CF-IPCountry), IANA timezone, UTC offset, browser language (Accept-Language), platform (Windows / macOS / Linux / Android / iOS / ChromeOS), browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge / Opera), and device type (Desktop / Mobile / Tablet). Numeric fields support range conditions. Built-in anti-fraud toggles block VPN/Tor users, spoofed identities, and impossible-travel scenarios — AND'd with the identity condition so VPN users are rejected even when their country matches. No GPS, no third-party fingerprinting; raw IPs are not retained beyond the verification check.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: Discord Bot for Country, Language, and Device Roles
seo.seoDescription: Auto-assign Discord roles by country, timezone, language, browser, platform, or device. Built-in VPN detection, anti-spoofing, and impossible-travel checks.
seo.h1: Auto-Assign Discord Roles by Country, Language, Timezone, and Device
seo.subhead: Detect member origin from HTTP headers and browser APIs — country, timezone, UTC offset, language, browser, platform, mobile vs desktop. Optional VPN detection, identity-spoof checks, and impossible-travel filtering keep things honest.

useCases.title: Country-flag roles, automated
useCases.body: Members visit the verification page once and the country role lands automatically — pulled from the Cloudflare CF-IPCountry header. No manual self-roles, no missing flags.

useCases.title: Language-specific channels
useCases.body: Gate German, Spanish, French, Japanese, etc. channels behind language roles assigned automatically from the member's browser language preference (Accept-Language).

useCases.title: Regional event coordination
useCases.body: Use timezone or UTC-offset roles to ping only the EU / NA / APAC slice for a stream, raid, or community event. UTC offset supports range conditions (e.g. -300 to -240 for US Eastern).

useCases.title: Mobile vs desktop / platform roles
useCases.body: Tag members by Device Type (Desktop / Mobile / Tablet), Platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, ChromeOS), or Browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, Opera). Useful for support-channel routing and platform-specific announcements.

useCases.title: Anti-fraud signals
useCases.body: Toggle VPN detection (IP-vs-timezone mismatch + Tor exit list), identity-spoof checks, and impossible-travel detection. Block accounts trying to fake their origin without writing rules by hand.

howItWorks.title: Member visits the verification page
howItWorks.body: One click. The member signs in with Discord; the plugin reads identity passively from headers and browser APIs — no GPS, no invasive tracking, no third-party fingerprinting.

howItWorks.title: Pick a condition and operator
howItWorks.body: Choose Country, Timezone, UTC Offset, Platform, Browser, Language, or Device Type. Numeric fields support =, >=, <=, and between; text fields support = and !=.

howItWorks.title: Optional anti-fraud filters
howItWorks.body: Layer on Block VPN, Block Spoofed Identity, or Block Impossible Travel. These are AND'd with the identity condition — VPN users are rejected even when their country matches.

faqs.q: How is the member's country detected?
faqs.a: From Cloudflare's CF-IPCountry header — accurate, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, no GPS, no precise location. RoleLogic doesn't retain the raw IP after the country lookup.

faqs.q: Does it block VPN users?
faqs.a: Optionally. Enable Block VPN and the plugin flags accounts where IP country and browser timezone disagree, plus accounts coming from known Tor exit nodes. You decide whether to deny the role or just log it.

faqs.q: What about user privacy?
faqs.a: Only country, timezone, language, browser, platform, and device type are stored. Raw IPs are not retained beyond the verification check. No GPS, no fingerprinting, no third-party trackers.

faqs.q: Can I detect mobile vs desktop?
faqs.a: Yes — the Device Type condition supports Desktop, Mobile, and Tablet, and Platform / Browser conditions go finer (Android vs iOS, Chrome vs Safari, etc.).

faqs.q: What is impossible-travel detection?
faqs.a: If a member's verifications come from two countries faster than they could physically travel, the plugin flags the second one. Requires at least two recorded visits to trigger and is optional.

plugins.name: Steam Player Role
plugins.short_description: Verify Steam profiles via OpenID and assign Discord roles by games owned, playtime, achievements, Steam level, VAC status, group membership, and country.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Steam profile data. Members verify through Steam OpenID — the same secure flow used by SteamDB and other Steam-powered sites — and roles are assigned based on configurable conditions including game ownership, total playtime, recent (last-2-weeks) playtime, achievement count, achievement completion percentage, specific achievements, Steam level, account age, total games owned, VAC ban status, game ban status, Steam group membership, and country. Operators include =, >, >=, <, <=, and between (range). Background data refresh keeps roles continuously synced with real Steam activity. Members must keep their Steam profile and game-details privacy public for the API to read playtime and achievements.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: How to Verify Steam Profiles and Sync Discord Roles to Activity
seo.seoDescription: Verify Steam accounts in Discord with OpenID. Assign roles by games owned, hours played, achievements, level, account age, VAC status, group, and country.
seo.h1: Verify Steam Profiles & Sync Discord Roles to Real Steam Activity
seo.subhead: Members verify with Steam OpenID — the same login flow Steam-powered sites use. RoleLogic syncs Discord roles to games owned, playtime, achievements, Steam level, account age, ban status, group membership, and country.

useCases.title: Game-owned gating
useCases.body: Members who own a specific Steam game get the role and access to its dedicated channels. Verified via Steam Web API — no honor system, no DM-screenshot proof.

useCases.title: Playtime tier rewards
useCases.body: Tiered roles by hours played (10h, 100h, 500h+, 1000h+). Auto-updated as members keep playing, so loyalty roles stay current without manual refreshes.

useCases.title: Achievement-based roles
useCases.body: Gate roles on achievement count, completion percentage, or specific achievements. Perfect for hardcore game communities and 100% completion clubs.

useCases.title: Recent-activity rewards
useCases.body: Use last-2-weeks playtime to reward currently-active players — an 'Active Player' role for anyone with 5+ hours in the last fortnight, auto-revoked when they go idle.

useCases.title: Anti-cheat / VAC filter
useCases.body: Optionally exclude VAC-banned or game-banned accounts from earning verified roles. Keeps competitive communities and trade-restricted channels clean.

useCases.title: Steam group membership
useCases.body: Verify members of a public Steam group and assign a matching Discord role — useful for Steam-first communities, modding groups, and tournament organizations.

howItWorks.title: Member signs in with Steam OpenID
howItWorks.body: Standard Steam OpenID — the same flow used by Steam-powered third-party sites. Members redirect to Steam, log in, and Steam returns a signed Steam ID. No password ever leaves Steam.

howItWorks.title: Configure your condition
howItWorks.body: Pick a metric (game ownership, playtime, Steam level, account age, achievements, VAC status, group, country) and a threshold. Operators include =, >, >=, <, <=, and between (range).

howItWorks.title: RoleLogic syncs roles automatically
howItWorks.body: Steam profile and game data is re-fetched on a schedule and roles update as members hit thresholds, finish achievements, or buy new games.

faqs.q: Do members need a public Steam profile?
faqs.a: Yes. Steam's Web API only exposes games, playtime, achievements, and friends data when both the profile and the 'game details' privacy settings are public. Private profiles can't be read by any third party — that's a Steam restriction, not a RoleLogic one.

faqs.q: How is the Steam account verified?
faqs.a: Steam OpenID — the same flow used by SteamDB, SteamCharts, and most Steam tools. Members log in via Steam itself; RoleLogic only ever sees the resulting signed Steam ID.

faqs.q: Can I check Steam group membership?
faqs.a: Yes. Provide the Steam group's ID and the plugin verifies membership for any public group. Combine with a country or playtime condition to layer requirements.

faqs.q: What about VAC and game bans?
faqs.a: The plugin can require members to be free of VAC bans and/or game bans before granting the role. Useful for cheating-sensitive communities, competitive servers, and trade-restricted channels.

faqs.q: Does country filtering use the user's IP?
faqs.a: No — it uses the country reported by Steam (the country set on their Steam account / store), which is more stable than IP geolocation and doesn't change when members travel.

plugins.name: Referral Code Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-assign Discord roles when members redeem codes — supports QR codes, time-limited batches, and 100k+ members per role link.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically grants Discord roles when members redeem codes. Create code batches with three modes: unique-per-code (each code redeemable once), unique-per-user (each code usable multiple times but once per user), or shared-unlimited (one code for unlimited users). Configure per-code and per-user redemption caps, batch expiry, automatic role duration (auto-revoke after N hours), and optional Discord invite links. Generate codes manually or in bulk; every code gets a shareable URL and downloadable QR code. Members sign in via Discord OAuth, redeem the code, and receive the role instantly with full redemption history tracking. Admin dashboard shows real-time stats and redemption logs. Built for scale: supports 100,000+ members per role link with atomic syncs. Perfect for Kickstarter rewards, podcast shout-outs, event wristbands, conference flyers, giveaways, and exclusive access programs.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: How to Grant Discord Roles With Redeemable Referral Codes
seo.seoDescription: Hand out redeemable codes that grant Discord roles. Single-use, multi-use, or shared, with optional expiry, role timers, redemption caps, and invite redirect.
seo.h1: Grant Discord Roles via Redeemable Referral Codes
seo.subhead: Generate codes, hand them out, and members redeem them for a Discord role. Build single-use, multi-use, or shared batches — with optional expiry, role-duration timers, max-redemption caps, and a custom invite URL.

useCases.title: Kickstarter and Patreon backer rewards
useCases.body: Generate one unique code per backer (unique-per-code batch). Backers redeem to unlock their backer role and channels — no manual approval queue, no reward spreadsheet.

useCases.title: Event wristbands and QR codes
useCases.body: Print one-time codes on physical badges or QR-coded flyers (shared batch or unique-per-code). Attendees scan, redeem, get the event role automatically. Set expiry to the event date.

useCases.title: Podcast and creator shout-outs
useCases.body: Drop a code in your latest episode or video (unique-per-user batch). Listeners who actually paid attention get a 'Listener' role, reusable up to your cap.

useCases.title: Time-limited access roles
useCases.body: Set role_duration_hours on the batch and the role auto-revokes after the timer — perfect for trial access, weekend events, or 24-hour beta windows. The expiry worker reaps roles on a one-to-two minute cadence.

useCases.title: Cross-server invites with redirect
useCases.body: Attach a Discord invite URL to the batch — the redemption page redirects users straight into the right server before granting the role.

useCases.title: Pending-redemption queue
useCases.body: If a member redeems before joining the Discord server, RoleLogic queues the role and grants it the moment they join. No second redemption, no follow-up DMs.

howItWorks.title: Create a batch
howItWorks.body: Choose batch kind: unique-per-code (one-shot codes), unique-per-user (each user redeems once, code reusable), or shared-unlimited (one code, many users). Set max redemptions, per-code cap, expiry, and optional role duration.

howItWorks.title: Distribute the codes
howItWorks.body: Hand them out via email, QR code, podcast script, livestream overlay, or wherever. Each redemption page lives at a stable share URL you can link or QR-encode.

howItWorks.title: Members redeem, role lands
howItWorks.body: Member signs in with Discord, enters the code, and the role is granted — even if they haven't joined the server yet. RoleLogic queues the role and applies it as soon as they join the guild.

faqs.q: What batch types are supported?
faqs.a: Three: unique-per-code (each code is single-use), unique-per-user (each user redeems once, code can be reused up to a cap), and shared-unlimited (one code, unlimited users until the batch cap or expiry).

faqs.q: Can codes expire?
faqs.a: Yes. Set a batch expiry timestamp, a max-redemption cap, or both. You can also set role_duration_hours so the granted role automatically revokes after a time window (precision is hours).

faqs.q: How big can a batch be?
faqs.a: RoleLogic's chunked role-link upload supports 100,000+ members per role link, so practical limits are very high. Real-world community batches run from a few dozen to hundreds of thousands.

faqs.q: What if a member redeems before joining the Discord server?
faqs.a: RoleLogic queues the role and a background worker grants it as soon as the member joins the guild — no second redemption needed, no DM follow-ups.

faqs.q: Is there abuse protection?
faqs.a: Yes — per-user rate limit (default 20 redeem attempts per hour), per-code redemption caps, and batch-level expiry. You can also lock a batch to a specific Discord server.

plugins.name: Loot Labs Reward Role
plugins.short_description: Auto-grant Discord roles when members complete a Loot Labs task — permanent or time-limited, with one-time postback setup per server.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically grants a Discord role when a member completes one Loot Labs task. Configure a Loot Labs short link, set the role duration in hours (or 0 for permanent), and share the claim link with your Discord members. Members log in with Discord, complete one Loot Labs offer, and receive the role within seconds — verified via Loot Labs's signed postback callback. Single-use claim tokens (puid) prevent direct-link bypass, and per-guild postback URLs mean Loot Labs only needs to be configured once per Discord server: paste the postback URL into creators.lootlabs.gg/advanced once, then create unlimited reward role links for the same server with no extra Loot Labs setup. Background worker auto-revokes time-limited roles when they expire (permanent roles are skipped). Perfect for monetized community access, supporter perks, content unlocks, paid early access, and any role that should follow a completed sponsor task.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: How to Monetize Discord Roles With Loot Labs Task Completions
seo.seoDescription: Auto-grant Discord roles when members complete a Loot Labs task. Verifies the signed postback, grants in seconds, and auto-revokes after a timer you set.
seo.h1: Reward Loot Labs Task Completions With Discord Roles — Automatically
seo.subhead: Members complete one Loot Labs task, RoleLogic verifies the signed postback, and the Discord role lands within seconds. Permanent or time-limited (1 hour to 10 years). One postback URL per Discord server — set it up once, then add as many reward roles to that server as you want.

useCases.title: Monetized supporter access
useCases.body: Gate a private channel, custom command, or community perk behind a Loot Labs task. Members complete one offer, get the role instantly, and you earn revenue per completion — no Patreon, no Stripe, no payout setup.

useCases.title: Time-limited access drops
useCases.body: Sell weekend events, beta windows, or 24-hour previews by setting role_duration_hours. RoleLogic auto-revokes the role when the timer hits — no manual cleanup, no scheduled jobs.

useCases.title: Permanent unlocks for content
useCases.body: Set duration to 0 for a permanent role — perfect for one-time content unlocks, lore drops, archive access, or 'paid' early access that doesn't expire. Permanent claims are skipped by the expiry worker forever.

useCases.title: Multiple reward tiers in one server
useCases.body: Run several role links in the same Discord server, each with its own Loot Labs short link and duration. The postback URL is shared per guild, so Loot Labs is configured exactly once — every later role link just needs a short link.

useCases.title: Anti-bypass via single-use tokens
useCases.body: Direct hits to your Loot Labs short link don't earn a role. The plugin issues a single-use puid token at the start of the claim flow and rejects any postback without one — so revenue, role grants, and bypass attempts all stay aligned.

howItWorks.title: Create a Role Link in RoleLogic
howItWorks.body: Pick the Discord role you want to grant. The plugin auto-generates a per-guild postback URL on first registration — one URL covers every reward role you'll ever add to this server.

howItWorks.title: Connect Loot Labs (one-time per server)
howItWorks.body: Paste the postback URL into creators.lootlabs.gg/advanced (tick the {CLICK_ID} macro — Loot Labs requires it). Then create a short link at creators.lootlabs.gg/dashboard and paste it back into RoleLogic. Pick a role duration in hours (0 = permanent) and save.

howItWorks.title: Members claim, role lands
howItWorks.body: Share the claim link in Discord. Members sign in with Discord, get redirected to Loot Labs, complete the task, and Loot Labs fires a signed postback. RoleLogic verifies the URL secret in constant time, matches the puid to the member, and grants the role within seconds.

faqs.q: Do I need a Loot Labs account?
faqs.a: Yes — a free creator account at creators.lootlabs.gg. You'll generate short links there and paste a postback URL once per Discord server. The plugin doesn't bring its own Loot Labs credentials; you control your own.

faqs.q: How is the Loot Labs postback verified?
faqs.a: Two layers. The postback URL has a 32-byte unguessable secret baked in (?k=...) — anyone without it can't forge a callback. And the plugin issues a single-use puid token at the start of the claim flow; postbacks without a valid puid are silently rejected. Loot Labs has no HMAC option, so URL secrecy + per-claim tokens are the auth.

faqs.q: Can the role expire automatically?
faqs.a: Yes. Set role duration in hours (1 to 87,600 — up to 10 years). Set to 0 or leave blank for a permanent role. The background expiry worker revokes time-limited roles automatically; permanent ones are skipped.

faqs.q: Can I add more than one reward role to the same Discord server?
faqs.a: Yes — that's the point of the per-guild design. Each role link gets its own Loot Labs short link and duration, but every reward role in the server reuses the same postback URL. Configure Loot Labs's postback once per server and you're done forever.

faqs.q: What if a member opens the Loot Labs short link directly without going through the claim link?
faqs.a: They won't earn a role. The plugin requires a single-use puid token issued at the start of the claim flow; postbacks without one are logged but never granted. So scrapers, link sharers, and bypassers complete the task at no cost to you and no benefit to themselves.

faqs.q: How fast are roles granted after the task completes?
faqs.a: Within seconds. Loot Labs fires the postback the moment the task is finished; RoleLogic verifies, persists the claim, and pushes the role to Discord on the next sync tick.

plugins.name: Roblox Player Role
plugins.short_description: Verify Roblox players and auto-assign Discord roles by account age, verified badge, gamepasses, group rank, and custom per-game stats.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Roblox account data, group membership, and custom in-game stats. Members link their Roblox account once via OAuth; roles are assigned using configurable conditions across three categories: Account (age, verified badge, friend/follower/following counts, ownership of specific badges/gamepasses/assets), Group (membership in a Roblox group, or minimum role rank within it), and Game (any custom stats reported by your Roblox game as custom numeric, boolean, or string fields — you define the stat names and conditions). Game stats are flexible and delivered via direct server push (batched in 60s intervals via the shipped Studio plugin or HttpService webhook) or polled automatically from Roblox Open Cloud DataStore v2 (no code changes required). Examples: level, wins, playtime, currency, isVIP, guild_score. Roles stay continuously synced as players progress. View verified Roblox players in your Discord server, tracking linked accounts and their stats. Scales to 30M+ members per role link.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: Discord Bot for Roblox — Verify Accounts and Sync Game Stats
seo.seoDescription: Verify Roblox accounts in Discord with OAuth. Auto-assign roles by account age, group rank, gamepasses, badges, and live in-game stats from your Roblox game.
seo.h1: Verify Roblox Players & Sync Game Stats to Discord Roles
seo.subhead: Members link Discord and Roblox with a one-click OAuth. RoleLogic auto-grants Discord roles based on account data, group rank, gamepasses, badges — and per-game stats pushed straight from your Roblox game server or pulled from Open Cloud DataStore.

useCases.title: Group rank to Discord role
useCases.body: Sync a Roblox group rank to a Discord role. Promote someone in-group, their Discord role updates on the next sync. Require a minimum rank (e.g. rank ≥ 50) for staff or moderator channels.

useCases.title: Gamepass and badge perks
useCases.body: Owners of a specific gamepass get a Discord role automatically. Holders of a rare badge get another. Auto-revoked if they trade, refund, or remove the badge.

useCases.title: In-game progression roles
useCases.body: Push player stats from your Roblox experience (level, wins, playtime, isVIP) via the shipped Studio plugin or HttpService webhook. Reward Discord members based on real game progression — no extra code in your Discord bot.

useCases.title: Account age and trust gating
useCases.body: Require a minimum Roblox account age (e.g. 365+ days) before granting verified-member roles. Filters out alts and freshly-created throwaway accounts.

useCases.title: Verified-badge gates
useCases.body: Require Roblox's Verified badge for staff or trusted channels. Optional 'verification' OAuth scope makes the badge state available to RoleLogic.

howItWorks.title: Member signs in with Roblox OAuth
howItWorks.body: One-click PKCE OAuth — no profile-description handshakes, no copy-paste codes. Account and (if requested) verified-badge data come from the OAuth response.

howItWorks.title: Configure account, group, or game conditions
howItWorks.body: Pick from account stats (age, friends, badges count, ownership of specific badges/gamepasses/assets), group membership and rank, or per-game stats from your Roblox universe.

howItWorks.title: Optional — connect your Roblox game
howItWorks.body: Install the RoleLogic Studio plugin or call the ingest webhook from your game's HttpService to push live stats. Or supply an Open Cloud API key and let RoleLogic poll your DataStore on a schedule.

faqs.q: How is the Roblox account verified?
faqs.a: Roblox OAuth (PKCE) — the same secure flow Roblox-powered websites use. Members log in with Roblox itself, the plugin reads their user ID, and the link sticks. No profile-description handshakes, no copy-paste codes.

faqs.q: Can I sync per-game stats from my Roblox experience?
faqs.a: Yes — two paths. (1) Push: install the RoleLogic Studio plugin (batches every 60 seconds, up to 100 players per request) or POST stats from your game's HttpService. (2) Pull: provide an Open Cloud API key and RoleLogic polls your DataStore on a schedule.

faqs.q: What account stats can I gate on?
faqs.a: Account age (days), verified badge, friends / followers / following / badges count, and ownership of specific badges, gamepasses, or assets by ID.

faqs.q: What about multi-account abuse?
faqs.a: Each Roblox account links to one Discord account at a time. Switching requires a fresh OAuth, and account-age conditions help filter newly-created alt accounts before they earn trusted roles.

faqs.q: How big can it scale?
faqs.a: RoleLogic's chunked role-link upload supports tens of millions of users per role link. Real Roblox communities of every size — from indie experiences to Front Page games — run this plugin in production.

plugins.name: TikTok Creator Role
plugins.short_description: Verify TikTok creators and auto-assign Discord roles based on follower count, verification status, video count, likes, and bio.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on TikTok account stats. Members link their Discord and TikTok accounts via TikTok Login Kit OAuth, and roles are assigned based on configurable conditions: verified account status, minimum follower count, minimum following count, minimum total likes across videos, minimum video count, and non-empty bio with optional minimum character length. Roles are continuously synced as TikTok stats refresh on an adaptive schedule — active members are re-checked more frequently than idle ones, fitting within TikTok's API quota limits. Perfect for creator communities, influencer tiers, and validating real active accounts.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: Discord Bot for TikTok Creators — Verify Followers and Stats
seo.seoDescription: Verify TikTok accounts in Discord and auto-assign roles by follower count, verified badge, video count, total likes, following count, and bio length.
seo.h1: Verify TikTok Creators & Sync Discord Roles to Account Stats
seo.subhead: Members link Discord and TikTok via TikTok Login Kit OAuth. RoleLogic syncs Discord roles to follower count, verified status, video count, total likes, following count, and bio — keeping roles current as stats change.

useCases.title: Verified-creator-only channels
useCases.body: Gate a channel behind a TikTok verified-account condition. Only members with the blue check get access — no unverified accounts, no fakes.

useCases.title: Influencer tier roles
useCases.body: Tiered roles by follower count: 'Up-and-Coming' (100+ followers), 'Influencer' (10k+), 'Mega Creator' (100k+). Roles auto-update as followers grow.

useCases.title: Activity-based perks
useCases.body: Gate bonus channels on total likes (1k+ = 'Engagement'), video count (20+ = 'Prolific'), or following count. Recognize active creators automatically without manual vetting.

useCases.title: Real-account filtering
useCases.body: Require a minimum bio length and/or verified status to filter out throwaway accounts. Non-empty bio + video count conditions catch spam accounts automatically.

useCases.title: Creator community moderation
useCases.body: Use follower count as a proxy for moderation access — the 10k+ followers role goes to moderators, so your mod team is always legitimate creators.

howItWorks.title: Add your TikTok app credentials
howItWorks.body: Register at TikTok Developer and enable Login Kit. Add your client key and secret to the dashboard — one-time setup.

howItWorks.title: Pick your conditions
howItWorks.body: Require verified account (blue check), minimum follower count, minimum following count, minimum total likes, minimum video count, or minimum bio length. Combine any of them — all enabled conditions are AND'd together.

howItWorks.title: Members link TikTok via OAuth
howItWorks.body: One click. Members hit the verification page, log in with TikTok, and RoleLogic reads their account stats. Roles are granted and continuously re-synced as stats change.

faqs.q: How are TikTok stats fetched?
faqs.a: RoleLogic uses TikTok Login Kit (OAuth) and the TikTok Display API (/v2/user/info/) to read public account stats — followers, verification status, videos, likes, etc. No login storage, no credentials kept.

faqs.q: How often are stats re-checked?
faqs.a: On an adaptive schedule. Active members are re-checked more frequently (every 30 min to a few hours) than idle ones, fitting within TikTok's daily API quota.

faqs.q: What if a member's follower count drops below the threshold?
faqs.a: On the next re-check, RoleLogic detects the drop and removes the Discord role automatically. No manual revoke, no alerts — just automatic sync.

faqs.q: Can I require a verified badge?
faqs.a: Yes. Enable 'Require verified account' and only members with the TikTok blue check will get the role.

faqs.q: Does the member's TikTok profile need to be public?
faqs.a: Yes. TikTok's public Display API only works for public profiles. Private accounts can't be verified by any third party — that's a TikTok restriction.

plugins.name: Form Respondent Role
plugins.short_description: Build Discord application forms, quizzes, polls, and surveys that auto-assign roles based on answers, score, or simple submission.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that gates Discord roles behind a member-fillable form. Build forms with single choice, multi choice, dropdown, scale, short text, long text, number, email, date, agreement, and info/image/video display blocks. Quiz mode auto-grades answers server-side and shows respondents a pass/fail result; surveys grant a role on any submission. Configure conditions per-question (equals, not equals, contains, regex, between for numeric ranges) or on quiz total score, then RoleLogic grants the Discord role on submit. Built-in anti-cheat: correct answers and point values are server-side only and never sent to the browser, question order and option order shuffle per page load, quizzes are one-shot with no edit-loop oracle, and the submit endpoint is CSRF-protected. Optional Discord-membership requirement, minimum Discord account age gate, scheduling (opens-at / closes-at), Discord webhook on each submission, admin response dashboard with CSV export and per-question columns, draft auto-save, and Discord OAuth identity binding. Perfect for server applications, rules-acknowledgement quizzes, age gates, role applications, partner/whitelist forms, member onboarding surveys, knowledge-check quizzes, and any Discord role that should be earned by answering correctly or simply by submitting a form.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

seo.seoTitle: Discord Application Form & Quiz Bot — Auto-Assign Roles by Answers
seo.seoDescription: Build Discord application forms, quizzes, and surveys that auto-assign roles. Server-side auto-grading, shuffled questions, pass/fail results, CSV export — no coding.
seo.h1: Discord Application Forms & Quizzes That Auto-Assign Roles
seo.subhead: Build a form in the dashboard — single choice, multi choice, scale, text, agreement, and more. Quizzes auto-grade server-side and surface pass/fail. Surveys grant a role on any submission. Conditions on per-question answers or quiz total score decide who gets the Discord role.

useCases.title: Server applications & whitelist forms
useCases.body: Staff applications, partner applications, whitelist requests, vouch forms — members fill the form via Discord OAuth, you review responses in the admin dashboard, and the role can be auto-granted on submission or gated behind specific answers.

useCases.title: Rules-acknowledgement quizzes
useCases.body: Make members prove they read the rules before getting the Verified role. Quiz mode auto-grades on submit, requires a passing score you set, and is one-shot with shuffled questions and options — so members can't share answer keys or edit-loop their way to a pass.

useCases.title: Age gates and NSFW acknowledgement
useCases.body: Combine an age field with a required agreement question. Roles only granted when both conditions match — useful for 18+ channels, mature-content gating, and any community that needs an explicit declaration on record.

useCases.title: Onboarding surveys with auto-routing
useCases.body: Ask new members which game, region, language, or interests they care about. Per-answer conditions auto-route them into the matching channels via Discord roles — no manual self-role reactions, no /role command spam.

useCases.title: Knowledge-check quizzes for staff promotion
useCases.body: Gate moderator and trial-staff roles behind a quiz. Configure a passing score, shuffle questions per attempt so memorisation doesn't carry over, and review individual responses with full per-question CSV export when you need an audit trail.

useCases.title: Anti-bot human verification
useCases.body: Replace a captcha with a single-question quiz that's trivial for humans and impossible for opportunistic bots. The submit endpoint is CSRF-protected and identity-bound to the verified Discord session.

useCases.title: Fan-community lore quizzes
useCases.body: Theme the form to your community — Genshin lore, game patch knowledge, podcast trivia, anime opinions — and grant a 'Lore Master' or 'Day One Fan' role to anyone who passes. Re-shuffled question order keeps each attempt fresh.

useCases.title: Branching role applications
useCases.body: Run multiple forms in the same Discord server, each linked to a different role. 'Apply for Builder', 'Apply for Streamer', 'Apply for Moderator' — separate forms, separate review queues, separate roles.

howItWorks.title: Build your form in the dashboard
howItWorks.body: Drag-and-drop builder with 13 question types (single choice, multi choice, dropdown, scale, short/long text, number, email, date, agreement, plus info / image / video display blocks). Toggle quiz mode to auto-grade and set a passing score.

howItWorks.title: Link a Discord role to the form
howItWorks.body: Pick the role you want to gate. Then choose how to gate it: any submission, quiz total score ≥ N, or per-question conditions (answer equals, contains, matches regex, falls in a numeric range — combinable with AND/OR).

howItWorks.title: Share the form URL with members
howItWorks.body: Drop the form link in your Discord server. Members sign in with Discord, fill the form, hit submit, and RoleLogic grants the role within seconds. Quiz takers see pass or fail — never the raw score, so the answer key stays secret.

howItWorks.title: Review responses in the admin dashboard
howItWorks.body: Every submission lands in the response viewer with per-question answers, score, timestamps, and Discord ID. Export the whole batch to CSV (one column per question) for audits, follow-ups, or external analysis.

faqs.q: What question types are supported?
faqs.a: Thirteen total: single choice, multi choice, dropdown, scale (1–10 etc.), short text, long text, number, email, date, agreement (required tick-box), and info / image / video display blocks. Single choice, multi choice, dropdown, scale, number, and text questions can all be marked as quiz questions with a `correct` answer and point value.

faqs.q: Can quiz takers cheat by viewing the page source?
faqs.a: No. Correct answers and point values are stripped from the form payload before the browser ever sees it — grading happens entirely server-side. Question order and option order are also shuffled on every page load, so memorising 'option B is right' doesn't carry over between attempts or members.

faqs.q: Can someone submit the quiz multiple times until they pass?
faqs.a: No. Quiz mode is one-shot per Discord account, with no edit-loop and no raw score echoed back — only pass or fail. That removes the score-oracle that lets users tweak answers and resubmit. For non-quiz forms, admins can opt into 'allow edits' or unlimited submissions if it fits the use case.

faqs.q: How is the role assigned after submission?
faqs.a: On submit, RoleLogic re-validates answers against the form schema, computes the quiz score if applicable, persists the response, and enqueues a background sync job. The Discord role lands within seconds via the standard RoleLogic role-link system — the same path used by every other plugin.

faqs.q: Can I gate the role on specific answers, not just quiz score?
faqs.a: Yes. Conditions can target individual questions (answer equals X, contains Y, matches regex, falls in a numeric range, is in a list, etc.) or the quiz total score. Combine multiple conditions with AND/OR — for example 'age ≥ 18 AND agreed to rules AND favourite_game = TitleX'.

faqs.q: Can I require Discord-server membership to submit?
faqs.a: Yes. Toggle 'Member must already be in the server' on the form, and only Discord users who are already members of your guild can submit. Optional minimum-Discord-account-age gate (0–3650 days) filters out brand-new throwaway accounts too.

faqs.q: Can I export responses?
faqs.a: Yes — every form has a CSV export at /admin/{guild}/forms/{form_id}/responses.csv with one column per question plus Discord ID, score, submitted-at, and last-edited-at. Useful for vouch reviews, staff promotion audits, and external analysis pipelines.

faqs.q: Can I schedule when the form opens or closes?
faqs.a: Yes. Set an opens-at and/or closes-at timestamp on the form — submissions are rejected with a helpful message outside that window. Useful for application cycles, event windows, and time-limited recruitment drives.

faqs.q: Does it send a webhook on each submission?
faqs.a: Optionally. Paste a Discord webhook URL on the form and every submission posts a message to that channel with the respondent's Discord handle, response ID, and (for quizzes) total score. Outbound URLs are validated against SSRF — only public HTTPS hosts allowed.

faqs.q: Can I run multiple forms in the same Discord server?
faqs.a: Yes. Each form is its own role link with its own conditions, schedule, and webhook. Run a Staff Application, a Whitelist Form, and a Rules Quiz side-by-side, each gating a different role, all in the same guild.

faqs.q: Is there a preview mode?
faqs.a: Yes. Every form has a preview URL (separate from the live submit URL) that lets admins walk through the form exactly as a respondent would see it — without persisting anything. Useful for QA before sharing the live link.
